task_completion.description: Verify the meeting is named 'Executive Severance Review'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a calendar event block or a meeting details form with the subject/title 'Executive Severance Review'.

task_completion.description: Verify the meeting is scheduled on Thursday of the upcoming week
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the calendar grid or date picker in the meeting form. The event should be placed on a Thursday, specifically in the week following the current week.

task_completion.description: Verify the meeting is scheduled at 2:00 PM (14:00)
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the time fields in the meeting form showing '14:00' or '02:00 PM', or the event block aligned with the 14:00/2 PM slot on the calendar grid.

task_completion.description: Verify the meeting location is set to 'HR Private Office'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Location' field in the meeting details form containing the text 'HR Private Office'.

task_completion.description: Verify 'Grace Patel' and 'Frank Rivera' are listed as attendees
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Attendees' field or list in the meeting form. Both 'Grace Patel' and 'Frank Rivera' must be visible as selected contacts/tags.

task_completion.description: Verify the Administrator is NOT listed as an attendee
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Attendees' field. Ensure that neither 'Administrator' nor 'Mitchell Admin' are present in the list of attendees. The agent must have actively removed them.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Odoo web interface to schedule the meeting
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Odoo Calendar web application in a browser, not terminal commands, python scripts, or API calls.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually filled out the meeting form
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the meeting creation/edit modal or form being actively filled out, rather than just text pasted into a notepad or search bar.

integrity.description: Verify the page was not manipulated using browser developer tools
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer console/inspector should not be open and used to fake the meeting details.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Time: 14:00 (2:00 PM). Target Location: 'HR Private Office'. Required Attendees: 'Grace Patel' and 'Frank Rivera'. Forbidden Attendees: 'Administrator' and 'Mitchell Admin' (the admin user is added by default in Odoo and must be explicitly removed by the agent). The meeting must be named 'Executive Severance Review' and scheduled on Thursday of the upcoming week.
